codeReview.summary: The fix directly resolves the prior blocking parity bug: PeerRow now renders effective_policy-driven badges for offline peers in runtime mode while preserving Paper-mode offline badge suppression. Added tests cover the offline runtime case in PeerRow and parity assertions now include an offline peer.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ui-screen-worker procedure expects agent-browser verification of changed UI, but this fix's exact runtime path (PeersPanel with paperPanels=false plus offline peer + permissionState) is not directly exposed by an existing demo scenario, forcing reliance on Vitest for the critical check.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback for session cc7ad1ba-2e46-4f5b-a3cb-0c721e4f410d sets followedProcedure=false and notes no existing demo scenario for runtime-mode PeerRow offline verification; transcript skeleton shows scenario exploration and this limitation.

summary: Reviewed fix feature plus prior failing feature diff and prior review. The fix commit 8633b6f addresses the original offline-peer badge parity failure from m3-peer-policies-view, and the new/updated tests provide targeted regression coverage for that path.
